03
HTML · CSS · JavaScript
Azure To-Do List
  • Designed and built a fully functional task manager app from scratch
  • Implemented add, complete, and delete task features with local storage
  • Crafted a clean, responsive UI with a calming azure blue theme
  • A personal project — coded entirely by a CS student, for herself
Built by a CS student · for personal productivity · with pure web tech
● HTML5 ● CSS3 ● JavaScript ● LocalStorage
// Azure To-Do List — by Madhubala
 
function addTask(taskText) {
  const task = {
    id: Date.now(),
    text: taskText,
    done: false
  };
  tasks.push(task);
  saveToStorage(tasks);
  renderTasks();
}
 
function toggleDone(id) {
  tasks = tasks.map(t =>
    t.id === id ? {...t, done: !t.done} : t
  );
  saveToStorage(tasks);
}
 
// tasks persist across sessions ✓
